intended_vs_unintended.unintended: Any docs/book, docs/entities, docs/research/claims.md, source_registry, schema, daily_book_worker, raw/unknown data changes unless separately proven generated/required and allowed by profile.

title: Autonomous production execution recovery and dependency hardening
